credits.page.title: Buy credits
credits.page.subtitle: Choose a subscription package. Credits renew each billing period — this is not a one-time permanent top-up.
credits.page.error: Could not load packages. Please try again.
credits.package.monthly.explain:
Receive {amount} credits to use within 1 month.

Note: After 1 month, unused credits are reset (removed).
credits.package.yearly.explain:
Better value (save 100,000 VND vs buying monthly).

Each month you receive {amount} credits (200 more than the monthly plan).

Note: Credits reset at the end of each month — they do not roll over forever.
credits.dialog.title: Pay by transfer
credits.dialog.waiting: Waiting for your transfer. This screen updates automatically when payment succeeds.
credits.dialog.waitingFake: Dev mode: no bank transfer needed. Tap simulate payment, or wait if another process completes the checkout.
credits.dialog.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
credits.dialog.errorBank: Bank payment is not configured on the server yet.
credits.dialog.expired: This checkout expired. Close and choose a package again.
auth.logoutMock: Mockup: logged out. (No real auth yet.)
auth.notFoundMessage: This QR code is invalid, already used, or expired (each code works once per ~1 minute window). Wait for a new code on your MeUp device, then scan again.
auth.login.title: Sign in
auth.login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your MeUp products.
auth.register.title: Create account
auth.register.subtitle: Sign up with your email to get started.
auth.error.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.error.weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.error.too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth.error.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
auth.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.google.error.generic: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.google.error.invalid_token: Google sign-in expired or invalid. Please try again.
auth.google.error.google_account_conflic: This Google account cannot be linked to your email.
auth.google.error.google_not_configured: Google sign-in is not configured on the server.
verify.page.successBody: Your email has been verified successfully.
verify.page.failBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verify.banner.message: Your email is not verified yet.
verify.banner.sent: Verification email sent — check your inbox.
verify.banner.error: Could not send. Please try again later.
home.title: Manage vocabulary on MeUp
home.subtitle: Study language is in the header — change it anytime. Continue where you left off or create something new.
home.continueJobHint: Open Library → Jobs to track progress
home.continueProductHint: Open the editor for this product
languagePair.title: Study language
languagePair.subtitle: Choose the language you want to practice vocabulary in.
languagePair.studyHint: The language you want to learn vocabulary in
selectStudy.title: Choose a study language
selectStudy.hint: The device did not send a study language. Pick the language you want to learn.
products.my.title: My products
products.my.description: View and manage vocabulary sets you created or are studying.
products.new.title: Create new product
products.new.description: Design a new vocabulary set with card templates and playback sequence.
products.explore.title: Explore products
products.explore.description: Browse community products and system packages.
products.emptyOwned: You have no products for this language pair yet.
products.filterPairShared: Showing products shared with you for: {pair}
products.emptyPurchased: You have not purchased any products for this language pair yet.
products.emptyShared: No products have been shared with you for this language pair yet.
products.emptyRequests: No vocabulary create requests for this language pair yet.
products.errorGeneric: Could not load products. Please try again.
products.shared.hint: Open your MeUp device to sync and study this product.
editProgram.notFound: Product not found for this language pair.
editProgram.subtitle: Editing {name} · {pair}
editProgram.title: Edit product
editProgram.hint: Update title, card structure, and vocabulary. Publish exports a new package version.
editProgram.vocabHint: Edit rows inline; use media icons to attach image or audio via staging upload.
editProgram.done.publishingHint: Exporting a new package version. This may take a moment.
editProgram.done.successHint: A new package version is live on your device sync catalog.
editProgram.error.load: Could not load the editor. Please try again.
products.settings.title: Product settings
products.settings.subtitle: Update marketplace info. Public products appear on Explore.
products.settings.shareModeHint: Public products can be purchased on Explore. Private products are only visible to you.
products.settings.creditPriceHint: 0 means free. Buyers pay this amount in credits.
products.settings.validation.creditPrice: Enter a valid price (0 or greater).
products.settings.error.generic: Could not save settings. Please try again.
products.settings.error.invalid_request: Invalid settings — check name and price.
products.settings.error.forbidden: You are not the owner of this product.
products.share.title: Share product
products.share.subtitle: Grant access to {name} for specific users.
products.share.empty: No one has been shared this product yet.
products.share.addHint: Enter an account email and/or a MeUp device order number. At least one is required.
products.share.deviceOrderHint: Serial number shown on the device or in factory registration.
products.share.validation.targetRequired: Enter an email or device order.
products.share.validation.deviceOrderInv: Device order must be a positive number.
products.share.error.load: Could not load share list. Please try again.
products.share.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
products.share.error.share_target_not_fo: No user found for that email or device order.
products.share.error.forbidden: You are not the owner of this product.
explore.errorGeneric: Could not load the catalog. Please try again.
explore.empty: No public products for this language pair yet.
explore.purchase.error.already_has_acces: You already have access to this product.
explore.purchase.error.cannot_purchase_o: You cannot buy your own product.
seller.title: Seller earnings
seller.description: Track product sales and payout history for your account.
seller.errorGeneric: Could not load seller data. Please try again.
seller.emptySales: No sales recorded for your account yet.
admin.gate.title: Admin access
admin.gate.subtitle: Enter the admin secret to open the management panel.
admin.gate.error.generic: Could not verify admin secret. Please try again.
admin.gate.error.unconfigured: Admin API is not configured on the server.
admin.panel.title: Admin panel
admin.payout.title: Record seller payout
admin.payout.hint: Increase records a payout to the seller; decrease reverses or adjusts.
admin.payout.validation: Enter seller ID, a positive amount, and channel.
admin.packages.hint: Edit the two credit packages stored in system_config. Changes appear on /credits after the API config cache refreshes.
admin.packages.name: Name
admin.packages.validation: Each package needs a name, amount > 0, and priceVnd > 0.
admin.firmware.title: Firmware OTA
admin.firmware.hint: Publish a .bin to force devices onto this version. Clear APP_VERSION to stop forcing OTA.
admin.firmware.versionMatchHint: Must match MEUP_APP_VERSION in include/util/AppVersion.h (hardcoded in the .bin you just built). Exact string — not semver; a typo or older version still forces OTA.
admin.firmware.clearConfirm: Clear APP_VERSION so devices stop forced OTA? File on R2 is kept.
admin.firmware.error.invalidVersion: Version must be non-empty, with no spaces or path separators.
admin.firmware.error.fileTooLarge: File must be at most 5 MiB.
admin.credits.title: Adjust user credits
admin.credits.hint: Add or remove credits in a user's wallet (not seller settlement).
admin.credits.targetHint: Pick a user by user ID, email, and/or device order — at least one field (same as product share).
admin.credits.validation: Enter a user, credits > 0, and a reason.
admin.credits.error.user_not_found: No user found for the given target.
admin.credits.error.insufficient_credits: User does not have enough credits to deduct.
admin.config.title: System configuration
admin.config.hint: Edit system_config values used by meup-api and web pricing. Web clients cache web-config until reload or logout.
createHub.title: How do you want to create?
createHub.subtitle: Pick a path — same card layout and publish flow for all.
createHub.manual.title: Enter manually
createHub.manual.description: Type vocabulary rows; optional image and audio.
createHub.aiTitle.title: Generate from topic
createHub.aiTitle.description: Give a theme — AI suggests a word list.
createHub.aiParagraph.title: Extract from text
createHub.aiParagraph.description: Paste a paragraph — AI picks useful words.
createHub.aiImage.title: Generate from image
createHub.aiImage.description: Upload a photo — AI builds vocabulary from it.
createAi.refundNote: If fewer complete vocabulary items are produced (including required audio/image), unused credits will be refunded after packaging.
createAi.submitSuccess: Request submitted ({id}). Charged {credits} credits. Track progress under Products → Create requests.
createAi.setup.titleOptionalHint: Leave empty — the server will generate a title from your content.
createAi.setup.descriptionPlaceholder: Short description for the vocabulary set
createAi.validation.insufficientCredits: Need {credits} more credits for this request.
createManual.setup.title: Enter manually
createManual.setup.hint: Set title and card structure, then enter at least 8 vocabulary rows with optional media.
createManual.vocab.title: Enter vocabulary
createManual.vocab.hint: At least {min} rows required. Use media icons on each row to attach image or audio.
createManual.vocab.cancelConfirm: Discard vocabulary entry and delete staged uploads?
createManual.vocab.generateMissing: Generate missing media at create (~{credits} credits)
createManual.vocab.validation.tooFew: At least {min} vocabulary rows are required.
createManual.vocab.validation.emptyItem: Each row needs at least one non-empty field.
createManual.mediaPicker.generateHint: Uses row text (or title) — charged per generation.
createManual.mediaPicker.generateTextReq: Enter text in the row (or title) before generating.
createManual.mediaPicker.clipboardEmpty: No image or audio found on clipboard.
createRequests.hint: Tap Refresh to reload the list and check progress for in-flight requests (at most once every 5 seconds).
createRequests.refreshTooSoon: Please wait {seconds} seconds before refreshing again.
createRequests.type.title: From topic
createAiParagraph.validation.paragraphMi: Paragraph must be at least {min} characters.
createAiTitle.setup.title: Generate from topic
createAiTitle.setup.hint: AI generates vocabulary rows from your topic. Adjust card structure via Configuration if needed.
createAiTitle.setup.wordCountHint: Choose how many words to generate (min {min}, max {max}). Charged upfront as count × vocab price.
createAiTitle.setup.creditsEstimate: Estimated vocab job cost: ~{credits} credits (server calculates final amount).
createAiTitle.validation.wordCountRequir: Please enter how many words to generate.
createAiTitle.error.insufficient_credits: Not enough credits for this request.
createAiTitle.error.invalid_request: Invalid request — check language pair and schema.
createAiParagraph.setup.title: Extract from text
createAiParagraph.setup.hint: Paste a paragraph — AI picks vocabulary using a vocab job (fromParagraph).
createAiParagraph.setup.paragraphPlaceho: Paste or type the source text here…
createAiParagraph.validation.paragraphRe: Please paste or enter a paragraph.
createAiImage.setup.title: Generate from image
createAiImage.setup.hint: Upload a photo — it is resized and compressed before sending as a fromImage vocab job.
createAiImage.setup.imageHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF up to 20 MB. Optimized to JPEG (max ~1280px, target ≤1.5 MB) before upload.
createAiImage.validation.unsupportedType: Unsupported format — use JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF.
createAiImage.validation.compressFailed: Could not optimize this image. Try another file.
placeholder.products.title: My products
placeholder.products.description: Your product list will appear here — filtered by language pair, SRS progress, etc.
placeholder.explore.title: Explore products
placeholder.explore.description: Community product library and system packages will appear here.
createProgram.stepName.label: Product name
createProgram.stepSchema.title: Card field structure
createProgram.stepSchema.hint: Each row is a text column. Choose Text or Text + Audio — audio slots are derived on export (API format). Image is one toggle for the whole product.
createProgram.stepSchema.hasImageHint: One image slot per vocabulary row (API hasImage flag).
createProgram.customConfig.validation.le: Each level needs at least 2 card faces, and each face needs at least 1 play step.
createProgram.stepDone.title: Vocabulary request submitted
createProgram.stepDone.subtitle: Request finished — server is packaging your product.
createProgram.stepDone.submittingHint: Creating request and waiting for the job runner.
createProgram.validation.fieldsRequired: Each field needs a name and at least one schema row.
createProgram.validation.schemaLangRequi: Schema needs at least one preset field with native or study lang (studyText / nativeText).
createProgram.stepCardSetup.title: Levels and cards
createProgram.stepCardSetup.hint: One SRS level by default — add levels if needed. Use ←/→ to shift boundaries like on the MeUp device.
createProgram.stepCardSetup.previewHint: Select a face on the right to preview it.
createProgram.stepSide.playbackHint: Drag to reorder · tap ✕ to delete
createProgram.stepSide.playbackEmpty: No playback steps yet — add play or pause.
createProgram.preview.tapToEdit: Tap a region on the card to edit details
createProgram.preview.clickToEdit: Click a region on the card to edit details
createProgram.preview.dragHint: Tap another region to switch · drag body to move · drag corners to resize
createProgram.preview.dragHintDesktop: Click another region to switch · drag body to move · drag corners to resize
createProgram.stepDisplay.previewLabelHi: Leave empty to show the field name in preview.
createProgram.stepDisplay.outstandingCol: Wrap highlighted text in [[ and ]] — brackets are hidden on the card.
createProgram.validation.sidesRequired: Each level needs at least one card face.
createProgram.validation.vocabEmpty: Add at least one vocabulary row.
createProgram.validation.vocabRequiredFi: Each row must fill all text fields shown on the card.
createProgram.validation.vocabRequiredMe: Each row must include image/audio files used on the card or in playback.
createProgram.validation.csvNoDataRows: No vocabulary rows found — check headers and data below the header row.
createProgram.validation.csvNoMappedColu: No columns match your schema. Use the downloaded template or match column headers to field names.
createProgram.validation.csvImportConfir: Replace all existing rows with the CSV import? Choose Cancel to append instead.
createProgram.validation.csvImportFailed: Could not read the CSV file.
createProgram.stepVocab.title: Enter vocabulary
createProgram.stepVocab.hint: Each row is one card item. Select a row to preview — use [[highlights]] in text cells. Add image/audio in the media panel below.
createProgram.stepVocab.previewEmpty: Add a row to preview the card.
createProgram.stepVocab.noTextFields: No text fields in schema — go back and add text columns.
createProgram.stepVocab.csvHint: Text columns only. Header row must match field names in your schema (use the template).
createProgram.stepVocab.mediaHint: Files stay in the browser until upload API is connected. Preview uses local files.
products.emptyCollected: No purchased or shared products for this language pair yet.
explore.emptyHint: Try another language pair in the header, or create your own product.
